item.title: Landing - Mochi UI Kit
item.author: han@console.so (Han Ngo)
item.description: Mochi UI Kit Landing (Designing - tab Marketing Website): Link

item.title: Mochi Poll
item.author: han@console.so (Han Ngo)
item.description:
Requirement:

Features:

  • Poll Creation & Management:
    • Set up a poll with specific questions and multiple options and a deadline.
    • To finish creating a poll user must put some token in the poll which will be divided for all users vote for the poll.
    • Generate a unique, sharable link upon poll completion.
  • User Voting:
    • The Access link to vote opens for everyone
    • Require authentication using Discord, Twitter, or Wallet to vote.
    • Users can only vote once, can change vote but cannot claim another reward.
  • Reward Distribution: After the poll ends (deadline), the user receives the reward.
  • Visualization & Results: Allow poll creators to view outcomes in real time.

Design: Design
